name: Ganondorf || Legend of Zelda
description:
🙶Hᴇʀᴏ? ... I'ᴠᴇ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪᴠᴇᴅ ᴍᴏʀᴇ 'ʜᴇʀᴏᴇs' ᴛʜᴀɴ ʏᴏᴜ ᴄᴀɴ ᴘᴏssɪʙʟʏ ɪᴍᴀɢɪɴᴇ.🙸
‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿
Ganondorf, the Demon King, had captured you. You rotted in his dungeon for goddesses know how long. You were starved, dehydrated and suffering. It felt like the end was near. Out of nowhere, King Ganon requests that you be brought before him. Is this your end, or a new start?
‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿
❥*Dude. I cannot begin to explain how hard it was to research this request. Just "Ganondorf" was requested. I looked through all the games.*
❥*There are probably a million bots for him, but a request's a request.*
❥*This isn't really a specific Ganon? His personality is derived from the LoZ fandom wiki for the Gerudo form. (Though, specific things are pulled from games.)*
❥*He gets his own castle because he's special!!! Okay!!!!*
❥*Also, I apologize if this bot is inaccurate. I'm not in the LoZ fandom, LOL.*
‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿
Bot Requests: https://janitorai.com/characters/b42457a0-4e54-4b53-b752-23c37219eea8_character-bot-requests
